import React, { useState, useEffect } from "react"; import { useNavigate, Link } from "react-router-dom"; import { Image, Form} from 'react-bootstrap' import MainLayout from "../../components/Layout"; import BASE_URL from "../../config"; function Employee({ setModuleName }) { const [states, setStates] = useState([]); const [selectedState, setSelectedState] = useState(""); const [district, setDistrict] = useState([]); const [selectedDistrict, setSelectedDistrict] = useState(""); const [errors, setErrors] = useState({}); const [offices, setOffices] = useState([]); useEffect(() => { setModuleName("Employee Management"); loadStates(); }, []); const loadStates = async () => { try { const response = await fetch(`${BASE_URL}/user/get-state`); const data = await response.json(); setStates(data); } catch (err) { console.log(err); } }; const loadDistrict = async (StateID) => { try { const response = await fetch(`${BASE_URL}/user/get-district`, { method: "POST", headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json", }, body: JSON.stringify({ state_id: Number(StateID), }), } ); const data = await response.json(); setDistrict(data); } catch (err) { console.log(err); } }; return (
